meaning: n.(可分类或列举的)项目,条款,(消息、情报等的)一则,一条
examples: This item should be hand washed.
What's the next item on the agenda?
The other item on the agenda is the tour.
Literally bursting at the seams, this bag contains every single free item we've collected throughout the entire show.
Employees are an expense item, one that becomes increasingly burdensome when demand dries up.
